summary: CRITICAL ISSUES: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (line ~15 of workflow) — fails actionlint + security policy. (2) Test harness doesn't follow spec: task requires `act push --rm` loops for multiple test cases, appending output to act-result.txt, but workflow uses individual manual steps instead. (3) Python logic embedded in bash heredoc (generate_matrix.sh lines 40–130) harms testability. (4) No fixture file creation shown despite workflow referencing fixtures/basic_matrix.json, fixtures/include_matrix.json, etc. (5) No act-result.txt artifact produced. Script logic is sound, but delivery doesn't match GitHub Actions + testing requirements.
